diff: The `MANAGER_ROLE` on a Tokenized Treasury Instance is authorized to adjust the maximum swap size and oracle staleness threshold within bounds established by the `MANAGER_ADMIN_ROLE`. The `MANAGER_ROLE` is held by the Grove Relayer Multisig at `0x0eEC86649E756a23CBc68d9EFEd756f16aD5F85f` across all Tokenized Treasury Instances.
